Product descriptions from the supplier
Report abuse
Highlights at a glance
Breathable Material: Premium lightweight breathable fabric wicks away sweat and moisture all day long, keeps feet dry, cool and fatigue-free whether walking, standing for hours or outdoor activities.
Stylish Lace-Up Closure: Classic adjustable lace-up design allows a custom snug fit, super easy to put on and take off, while adding a sleek casual vibe to the overall look.
Durable Rubber Sole: Thickened wear-resistant rubber sole features anti-slip texture, delivers strong ground grip, shock absorption and excellent durability, perfect for long-time walking, commuting and daily outdoor errands.
Fashion Trend: Timeless minimalist style fits current fashion trends, effortlessly matching streetwear, casual wear and daily leisure styling.
Low-Top Design: Streamlined low-top silhouette offers great ankle freedom and unmatched versatility, easy to pair with jeans, leggings, shorts, skirts and all kinds of daily outfits.
